testcase.name: 4.5 Shopping Cart › TC-CART-01: Add single item to cart @smoke
4.5 Shopping Cart › TC-CART-02: Add multiple different items
4.5 Shopping Cart › TC-CART-03: Update item quantity in cart
4.5 Shopping Cart › TC-CART-04: Remove item from cart
4.5 Shopping Cart › TC-CART-05: Cart persists after page refresh
4.5 Shopping Cart › TC-CART-06: Empty cart message
4.5 Shopping Cart › TC-CART-07: Cart total calculation
4.5 Shopping Cart › TC-CART-08: Continue shopping from cart
Category Navigation - Left Panel Validation › should validate left nav category count matches header menu
Category Navigation - Left Panel Validation › should match each left nav category name with header menu
Category Navigation - Left Panel Validation › should navigate to each category page and display the correct title
4.7 Checkout Flow › TC-CHK-01: Complete checkout - Purchase Order @smoke
4.7 Checkout Flow › TC-CHK-02: Complete checkout — Credit Card
4.7 Checkout Flow › TC-CHK-03: Checkout with empty billing fields

4.7 Checkout Flow › TC-CHK-05: Checkout — shipping same as billing
4.7 Checkout Flow › TC-CHK-06: Order confirmation details
4.7 Checkout Flow › TC-CHK-07: Cannot checkout with empty cart
4.7 Checkout Flow › TC-CHK-08: Order appears in account history
4.3 Homepage and Navigation › TC-HOME-01: Homepage loads correctly @smoke
4.3 Homepage and Navigation › TC-HOME-02: Top navigation links work
4.3 Homepage and Navigation › TC-HOME-03: Featured products displayed
4.3 Homepage and Navigation › TC-HOME-04: Cart icon shows item count
4.3 Homepage and Navigation › TC-HOME-05: Footer links present
